metric_definitions.global_new_strict: Strict successes after global sequence deduplication across completed nodes in a run.
metric_definitions.gpu_hours: Completed child job runtime in Proteina-Complexa GPU-hours. Qwen/vLLM controller time is not included in the curve axis.
metric_definitions.strict_success: iPAE < 7/31, pLDDT > 0.90, and binder backbone RMSD < 1.5 A.
metric_definitions.structure_unique_strict: Foldseek-clustered strict successes. If run-level Foldseek is not available, this field is shown as pending rather than inferred.
metric_definitions.tree_reasoning: Public MethodCard fields: operator, lane, hypothesis, trigger, falsification rule, sanitized recipe, and measured node outcome.

nodes.falsification_rule: retire exact recipe if Foldseek-completed children produce zero structure-unique strict successes
nodes.hypothesis: HYPOTHESIS: strict-success families may be collapsing to one Foldseek cluster; TRIGGER: low structure-unique yield or high duplicate fraction; ACTION: wider noisy beam with sequence deduplication; METRIC: maximize structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 0 candidates
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify

nodes.falsification_rule: Retire if mean_duplicate_fraction > 0.6 OR mean_complex_confidence < 0.35 while structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour remains 0.0.
nodes.hypothesis: Standard beam search collapses into redundant local minima on hard-soluble allergens; switching to novelty-guided beam search with moderate sidechain noise will explicitly penalize redundancy and drive structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour upward by exploring distinct epitope-binding conformations.
nodes.observed: 0 global-new strict; 0 strict; 0 candidates
nodes.title: novelty_search_beam / diversify
nodes.trigger: structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour is 0.0 with high mean_duplicate_fraction across 4 prior beam_search trials

runs.variant_public: adaptive MethodCard tree search; 3 Complexa worker GPUs plus 1 Qwen/vLLM proposer GPU; hardened MethodCard validation and invalid-option recovery

runtime_notes: This is a live snapshot generated from report JSON files, not a frozen final benchmark table.
Local file paths and full binder sequences are intentionally omitted from the public page.
Ours V5 rows point to the hardened 12-hour reruns when their live report files are present.
title: Autoresearch V5 Public Results Snapshot
